name: cursola
flavor_texts: Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokémon’s core spirit.
Be cautious of the ectoplasmic body surrounding its soul. You’ll become stiff as stone if you touch it.
text: Cursola is the Coral Pokémon. It is a ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: weak-armor, perish-body (hidden). Base stats — HP: 60, Attack: 95, Defense: 50, Sp. Atk: 145, Sp. Def: 130, Speed: 30. Evolution line: corsola → cursola. Lore: Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokémon’s core spirit. Be cautious of the ectoplasmic body surrounding its soul. You’ll become stiff as stone if you touch it.
